pull.title: docs: complete interface description for `secp256k1_schnorrsig_sign_custom`
pull.body: For the sake of completeness, add the missing descriptions for the return value and parameters (`ctx`, `sig64`, `keypair`), in the same wording/style as for the function `secp256k1_schnorrsig_sign32`.

events.message:
docs: complete interface description for `secp256k1_schnorrsig_sign_custom`

For the sake of completeness, add the missing descriptions for the
return value and parameters (`ctx`, `sig64`, `keypair`), in the same
wording/style as for the function `secp256k1_schnorrsig_sign32`.
